title.en: Soon, Ye Tian took away the resources here, and...

content.en:
Soon, Ye Tian took away the resources here, and then went to another place.

As time passed, more and more primordial artifacts were killed.

And none of the half-step eightfold ancestors of the major forces have fallen, after all, the half-step eightfold ancestors who are qualified to come here are all very demonic half-step eightfold ancestors, and their life-saving ability is very strong, and it is difficult to be killed.

Somewhere in the secret.

A blood mirror appeared in Killua's hand, through which he could monitor all the primordial artifacts of the entire secret land.

"The strength of these cultivators is very strong, it seems that they are demonic geniuses among cultivators, for such a long time, these primordial artifacts have not even killed a single cultivator!"

Killua knew that if he continued like this, the elders of the Blood Man Tribe would be furious, and he would have to kill these cultivators.

"I'll have to do it myself!"

Killua decided.

Of course, these half-step Yae Origin Ancestors were very powerful, and even if he fought alone, he would not be able to kill them.

Therefore, he needed to join forces with the other clansmen of the Blood Man Tribe and perform the secret techniques of the Blood Man Tribe in order to kill these cultivators.

In the Blood Tribe, except for the Avatar-level powerhouse, the other clansmen have no status and can be sacrificed at any time.

Therefore, this time he was ready to sacrifice a large number of half-step Yae Origin Ancestors to assist him.

"Let's go!"

Killua took eighteen half-step eightefold ancestor-level bloodies and thousands of subordinate primordial artifacts comparable to the sevenfold ancestor level to besiege and kill a half-step eightfold ancestor.

......

"These primordial artifacts are too weak, the elders told us to be careful before coming, hehe, just these primordial artifacts, even if there are hundreds of half-step eightfold primordial artifacts, I can easily kill them in seconds!"

After killing a group of primordial artifacts with his hands, Lichen Dao Ancestor muttered.

As the half-step Yae Origin Ancestor of the Ten Dao Mountains, he has such arrogance!

Abrupt.

He noticed a group of primordial antiquities surging around him, seemingly surrounding him.

"Hey, you surround me!"

He didn't have the slightest worry that these primordial artifacts were too weak to kill him, even if they were numerous.

But after a long time, his pupils shrank, and he sensed an aura no less than his own, and even brought him a trace of death crisis.

"It's ......"

Lichen Daozu saw Killua, this blood man was obviously completely different from other blood people, the other party had wisdom at a glance, and the form was completely different from the blood man.

The other Bloodmen of the Bloodman Tribe could barely see the human form, as if it were a mass of blood, but Killua had the form of a human.

Rumble!!!

Killua and Lichen Dao Ancestor fought together in an instant, and there was no nonsense at all.

However, the other primordial artifacts were not touched.

"Sure enough, this blood man has wisdom, otherwise under normal circumstances, other primordial artifacts would definitely take action when they see a cultivator. "

Leaving the dust Dao Ancestor secretly said.

Of course, he didn't panic.

He thinks that Killua should be about the same strength as him, and it is impossible to kill him.

Sure enough, Killua fought with Lichen Dao Ancestor for a while, and he couldn't tell the winner.

It can be said that their strength has stood at the limit of the half-step Eightfold Ancestor, and when the difference in strength is not large, it is naturally difficult to distinguish the winner from the loser.

"Sure enough, I can't kill this half-step Eightfold Ancestor, I have to sacrifice other bloody people!"

Killua said darkly.

Immediately, he ordered the other primordial ancients to perform forbidden spells and dedicate their power to him.

This method is a temporary combat method researched by the Blood Tribe, which can sacrifice countless weak primordial artifacts to gain short but powerful strength to kill enemies.

Rumble!!!!

A large number of primordial artifacts around them began to perform forbidden spells to sacrifice themselves.

In an instant, countless blood-colored energy poured into Killua's body in an inexplicable way.

At this moment, Killua's power seemed to break the shackles and step into the Yae Primordial Ancestor.

But in fact, he is still not an Yae Ancestor!

But his strength has been terrifyingly improved!

Of course, this kind of improvement won't last long, and if it can be used to kill the Dust Dao Ancestor, there is no problem.

Rumble!!!!

Killua's right hand instantly pierced through the defenses of the Dust Dao Ancestor, directly shattering half of his body.

Lichen Daozu's face changed, knowing that he was not an opponent.

"Gotta escape!"

The Dusty Daozu tries to escape from Killua.

However, a blood mirror appeared in the void, and the means of directly making the Dust Dao Ancestor escape useless, he could not break through the time and space here to escape.

And with its own speed, it can't escape at all.

Puff puff puff!!

Lichen Dao Ancestor's body was shattered by Killua again and again, even if he had a lot of life-saving things, he still couldn't withstand such consumption.

Every instant, Killua attacked countless times.

Finally, fear appeared on the face of the Dust Dao Ancestor.

He can't bear it now!

Rumble!!!

Under another attack, Lichen Dao Ancestor's entire body was completely blown up, and he could no longer recover.

At this point, this half-step Yae Ancestor of the Ten Dao Mountains was killed.

......

Ten Mountains.

At the moment when the Leaving Dust Dao Ancestor fell, they knew it for the first time.

"Dust has fallen!"

A Ninefold Origin Ancestor lamented.

As soon as these Ninefold Primordial Ancestors communicated, they knew that the Dust Dao Ancestor had gone to the secret land, and it was obvious that he had fallen in the secret land.

"Lichen is also a Dao Ancestor who has condensed the Ninefold Life Dao Flower, and now the life level has reached 29, comprehending the Extreme Extreme Dao, and also creating the Superior Yuan Dao Control Technique. His strength had reached the limit of a half-step Eightfold Ancestor, how could he fall when he entered that secret place?"

"Yes, with Lichen's strength, even if he is besieged by countless primordial antiquities, it is impossible to fall, unless he encounters the kind of primordial artifacts that are far more powerful than him!"

"Could it be that the Blood Man Tribe sent a Blood Man at the level of a powerful Eightfold Ancestor? But it's impossible, that secret place can't let the Eightfold Ancestor enter. Even primordial antiquities have to follow this rule!"

"Yes, our Ninefold Origin Ancestor peak powerhouse of the Ten Dao Mountains can't send an Eightfold Origin Ancestor in, and the Blood People Tribe can't do it!"

"Inform the half-step Eightfold Ancestor who has a clone outside, let them be careful, it's best to cooperate in pairs, don't be surrounded by the original antiquities!"

"Do you want to inform the other forces?

"There's no need to notify, it's better for them to fall a few more half-step Eightfold Ancestors!"

......

Over time, Killua used this method to kill several half-step Yae Ancestors.

Naturally, the other forces also knew, so they contacted the other half-step Yae Ancestors as soon as possible.

At this moment, Ye Tian also received the news.

"How many half-step Eightfold Ancestors have fallen in this secret place?"

Ye Tian was a little shocked.

You must know that the half-step eightfold ancestor who is qualified to enter here is extremely strong, and the weakest one is also the eightfold life Dao flower condensed, even if the combat power is weaker than him, it will not be too weak.

It was very difficult for him to kill a half-step Eightfold Origin Ancestor here, but he didn't expect that several such demonic geniuses had fallen.

After another period of time, Ye Tian found himself also surrounded by a group of primordial antiquities.
